claims.text: NodeKit v0.2.0 generated, installed, compiled, checked, demonstrated, evaluated, benchmarked, and proof-verified both the Agentic RL and SMB-lending presets from empty directories in 37.221 seconds.
limitations: The timed acceptance is deterministic and local; it is not a production deployment benchmark.
The npm registry package is not published.

claims.text: The Casca FDE Deployment Lab passed its deterministic, live-provider, adversarial browser, reload, export, and identity-binding gates on one exact commit.
limitations: The application is synthetic and unaffiliated with Casca.
Deployment remains an explicitly missing release gate.

claims.text: The Agentic RL research lab exports step trajectories, trains a deterministic behavior-cloning baseline, blocks nine adversarial reward attacks, and evaluates a label-free process-separated heldout split.
limitations: This is not policy-gradient RL, preference optimization, online learning, GPU training, or a weight update.
The two-task heldout set is diagnostic and too small for generalization claims.

claims.text: The preregistered Agentic RL live-model baseline failed closed when the Azure-only, zero-data-retention OpenRouter route returned HTTP 404; no retry, fallback, token usage, or cost was accepted.
limitations: The live baseline produced no candidate completions and therefore proves enforcement, not model quality.

claims.text: Founder Quest Graph provides a read-only synthetic quest rail, bounded graph workspace, source-backed answer panel, and proof surface on an exact hosted revision.
limitations: This claim must remain future tense until deployment and fresh-user browser proof pass.

claims.text: NodeKit uses Anthropic's rare-disease research grants as an independent external scenario for mapping current research, novelty, execution, evaluation, and application readiness.
limitations: NodeKit is not affiliated with or endorsed by Anthropic and has not received this grant.

claims.text: NodeKit directed the research, product proofs, editable deck, walkthrough video, and browser-assisted publication of this campaign.
limitations: Past tense is prohibited until all artifact, publication, and public-URL receipts exist.
